feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Why DVDs are still worth keeping
Before you start calling me a cuck, it's a fucking joke nimrods. Get a grip.
I've never been able to finish a debate with a Liberal, not even my own brother

Remember when we all had a sense of privacy even in public and every single person on Earth wasn't carrying a mini video recorder in their pocket? Probably not. I keep forgetting how fucking old I am.
My last word on the subject; you're on your own now, Caitlin
The stupidest thing I'll post today
This is getting old even for me
J. Jonah giving Peter the straight dick
I wonder who the other is?
4000 years ago they built the Pyramids of Giza, now we got this...
Happy Heterosexual White Male History Month !!!
The UK Labour government's understanding of economics
entry.content: The UK Labour government's understanding of economics

entry.title: I wish I were this cool
entry.content: I wish I were this cool

entry.title: Took me a couple retakes before I got it
Not so quick to badmouth Americans after finally meeting us, are we? Now they know their media and politicians have lied to them all along. Spread the word, friends!
Illegal alien hivemind. New nestings only
People who use Double Standards all the time don't understand what a Double standard is... or how to spell Double or Standard.
Not if you're a Democrat (*Schultz from Hogan's Heroes* I know nothing!)
He left his ceremonial knife at home
Legacy media is your enemy but you should already know this
Border Patrol and ICE are going to need more Guys...a LOT more!
But the UK, France, Spain et al CAN'T do the same?
God bless the USA and her sweet sweet air conditioning ??
One of us, one of us, one of us
entry.content: One of us, one of us, one of us

entry.title: The WNBA don't need no Guys anyhow!
The new Wonders of the World
No Judas, it looks like you’re going to hell
Unfortunately within doesn’t have to cooperate
